creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Under: <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#eresources-summary>

> freebsd-bugbusters
> 
> Discussions pertaining to the maintenance of the FreeBSD problem report 
> database and related tools


For the linked page: 

> Could not service request.


In the Wayback Machine: 

<https://web.archive.org/web/20220521214326/https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-bugbusters>

<https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-bugbusters/> is serviceable, however: 

> This mailing list hasn't received yet any mail since its migration, 
> in 3 seconds you will be redirected to its mailman's archives


<https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-bugbusters/> – nothing since September 2019. 

<https://lists.freebsd.org/> – there's no listing for freebsd-bugbusters. 

If the listing will remain in the Handbook, its description should be concise: 

> maintenance of FreeBSD Bugzilla and related tools
